persons.arguments_against: Position 'resumed duties' is generic and did not score. But the full forename 'Mark Aitchison' (not an initial) matches exactly, the colony (Hong Kong) and year (1946, post-internment resumption) match the entry, and the name is distinctive. A different Mark Aitchison Young in HK in 1946 is not credible.
persons.would_overturn: A second same-surname person in the same colony and years holding the same office, or a printed death/birth date excluding these years.
